meta.goal: Reach a narrow but credible stakeholder UAT as soon as possible.
meta.summary: Full UAT happy path is implemented end-to-end. Cloud Run is deployed (gigsge-api + gigsge-web). Local dev stack is working: db:push + db:seed:uat (now also seeds regions/cities). Several UI bugs found during local testing were fixed on 2026-05-13: Sign In button styling, register page onBlur validation, phone field +995 prefix, password field labels, back navigation, and regions dropdown (seed-uat now calls seedRegions). Latest local validation shows the frontend build and API lint pass, and the applications route integration test now passes after the targeted backend fix. Cloud Build trigger substitution _API_URL still needs manual correction in GCP Console.

uatCriticalPath.task: Finish auth workflow coverage and harden the verified-user path.
Implement and mount gigs, applications, and contract happy-path API routes.
Replace placeholder web/admin pages with minimal UAT-ready user flows.
uatCriticalPath.notes: 11 routes: /, /register, /login, /verify, /account, /gigs, /gigs/new, /gigs/[id], /contracts/[id], and supporting lib. UAT seed provides 3 pre-verified accounts.

uatCriticalPath.task: Prepare stakeholder-facing docs, smoke checks, and a repeatable UAT environment.
completedSubtasks: Docker Compose stack (docker-compose.yml + Dockerfiles) on uat/first-slice — idempotent schema push + UAT seed on container start
Smoke check script at scripts/smoke-check.sh — 6 checks covering health, auth, gigs, regions
remaining: Provision GCE VM and deploy the stack
Run scripts/smoke-check.sh against the live URL to gate UAT handoff
Stakeholder user guides (step-by-step for poster and worker roles)
FAQ for trust model and fee structure
uatCriticalPath.notes: Docker stack and smoke check are done. Only GCE provisioning and stakeholder docs remain before first UAT handoff.

uiBugs.task: Sign In button on homepage had plain-text styling (no box).
Register: email field did not validate on blur.
Register: phone field required manual E.164 entry.
uiBugs.notes: Replaced with +995 prefix display + local number input. Only Georgia available.
Renamed to 'Create New Password' / 'Confirm New Password'.

uiBugs.task: Register: no back navigation to homepage.
uiBugs.notes: Added '← Back' link at top of form.
seed-uat.ts did not seed regions. Fixed: seedRegions() is now called inside seed-uat. Re-run pnpm --filter @gigs/api db:seed:uat to populate.

engineering.task: Expand unit test coverage for backend API routes (e.g., auth, gigs, contracts).
Fix the applications POST route 500 error and restore the worker application integration test.
engineering.notes: Resolved mock coverage in apps/api/src/__tests__/applications-contracts.integration.test.ts by stubbing the second notification insert. The targeted integration test now passes.

engineering.task: Write integration tests for critical workflows (e.g., user authentication, gig posting, contract lifecycle).
engineering.notes: Coverage now spans auth, gigs, applications, and the full contract lifecycle (sign/complete/dispute/cancel/quit), per PR #12. Total ~1,670 lines of test code across four files in apps/api/src/__tests__/.

engineering.task: Add end-to-end tests for user flows (e.g., gig poster creating a gig, worker applying, contract completion).
Test edge cases for token expiration, invalid inputs, and concurrency.
Finalize and test Cloudflare R2 integration for file uploads (e.g., gig images, user avatars, dispute evidence).
Validate EXIF stripping and MIME type checks for uploaded files.
Conduct load testing for the Fastify API to ensure scalability.
Optimize database queries (e.g., Drizzle ORM) for high-traffic scenarios.
Test frontend performance for mobile-first responsiveness.
Standardize error responses across all API routes.
engineering.notes: All routes consistently emit the { error, statusCode } shape. App-level setErrorHandler is wired in apps/api/src/app.ts so Zod and unhandled errors are normalized. If individual endpoints later need richer error payloads (field-level details, codes), revisit as a uat_hardening item.

engineering.task: Implement logging for critical errors (e.g., token verification failures).
Add backend hooks to log user actions (e.g., gig creation, contract updates).
Integrate a frontend analytics tool (e.g., Google Analytics, PostHog).

business.task: Create step-by-step guides for gig posters and workers (e.g., how to post a gig, how to apply for gigs).
Develop a FAQ section addressing common user concerns.
Define a go-to-market plan (e.g., target audience segmentation, social media campaigns).
Create marketing assets (e.g., explainer videos, blog posts highlighting unique features).
Develop educational content on the fee structure and dispute resolution process.
Host webinars or Q&A sessions for early adopters.

product.task: Finalize user-facing documentation (e.g., platform overview, contract lifecycle explanation, dispute resolution flow).
Add developer documentation for API usage.
Address remaining usability issues (e.g., simplify navigation, ensure mobile-first design is polished).
Conduct user testing to gather feedback on the interface.
Implement notifications for key events (e.g., contract updates, dispute resolution progress).
Add search and filtering options for gigs.
Build an admin dashboard to track user activity, revenue metrics, and dispute resolution statistics.

marketing.task: Create a brand identity (e.g., logo, color scheme, typography).
Build a landing page highlighting the platform’s value proposition.
Launch a community forum for gig posters and workers.
Partner with local influencers or organizations to promote the platform.
Set up feedback loops (e.g., surveys for early adopters, in-app feedback forms).
